evals.prompt: I have a new interview ready — the file is `irene_clark_cadavers.mp4` and I already have a transcript at `irene_clark_cadavers.txt`.
evals.expected_output: Skill uses the existing transcript, fetches filters.yaml, selects appropriate tags, generates a 'Griot and Grits - ' prefixed title, a 1-paragraph description, presents metadata for approval, shows upload command with correct flags, and provides the post-upload YouTube Studio checklist.

assertions.name: skips-transcription-when-txt-exists
assertions.description: Does NOT suggest running transcribe.py since irene_clark_cadavers.txt already exists
assertions.check: Response does not instruct the user to run Whisper or transcribe.py when a .txt file is already present

assertions.name: title-has-griot-and-grits-prefix
assertions.description: Generated YouTube title starts with 'Griot and Grits - '
assertions.check: Title field in response starts with exactly 'Griot and Grits - '

assertions.name: tags-include-medical-history
assertions.description: Tags include 'Medical History' — directly relevant to the cadaver topic
assertions.check: Response includes 'Medical History' in the tag list

assertions.name: tags-include-irene-clark
assertions.description: Tags include 'Irene Clark' from the people section of filters.yaml
assertions.check: Response includes 'Irene Clark' in the tag list

assertions.name: description-is-one-paragraph
assertions.description: YouTube description is a single prose paragraph, no bullet points
assertions.check: Description section contains no bullet points or numbered lists and reads as a single paragraph

assertions.name: upload-command-has-correct-video
assertions.description: Upload command references the correct video filename
assertions.check: Upload script command includes 'irene_clark_cadavers.mp4'

assertions.name: post-upload-checklist-present
assertions.description: Post-upload YouTube Studio manual checklist is shown
assertions.check: Response includes checklist items for Altered Content, Remixing, Comments moderation, and Like count

evals.prompt: Just dropped `david_reid_childhood.mkv` into the video folder, no transcript yet.
evals.expected_output: Skill detects no transcript, shows the transcribe.py command, then generates tags, title, description, upload command, and post-upload checklist.

assertions.name: shows-transcription-step
assertions.description: Skill shows the transcribe.py command since no .txt file exists
assertions.check: Response includes a reference to running transcribe.py or the transcription script

assertions.name: title-has-griot-and-grits-prefix
assertions.description: Generated YouTube title starts with 'Griot and Grits - '
assertions.check: Title field in response starts with exactly 'Griot and Grits - '

assertions.name: tags-include-north-carolina-or-family-history
assertions.description: Tags reflect the North Carolina/family/church themes of the interview
assertions.check: Response includes at least one of: 'North Carolina', 'Family History', 'Church Life', 'Personal Stories' in the tag list

assertions.name: tags-include-david-e-reid
assertions.description: Tags include 'David E. Reid' from the people section of filters.yaml
assertions.check: Response includes 'David E. Reid' in the tag list

assertions.name: description-is-one-paragraph
assertions.description: YouTube description is a single prose paragraph, no bullet points
assertions.check: Description section contains no bullet points or numbered lists

assertions.name: upload-command-has-correct-video
assertions.description: Upload command references the correct video filename
assertions.check: Upload script command includes 'david_reid_childhood.mkv'

assertions.name: post-upload-checklist-present
assertions.description: Post-upload YouTube Studio manual checklist is shown
assertions.check: Response includes checklist items for Altered Content, Remixing, and Comments moderation

evals.prompt: I've got a new interview — `unknown_speaker.mp4`, no transcript. The person talks about growing up in Brooklyn in the 1960s, working in the garment industry, and how the neighborhood changed after white flight.
evals.expected_output: Skill detects no transcript, runs transcribe.py, generates tags from filters.yaml without adding unnamed person to people tags, generates title/description/upload command/checklist.

assertions.name: shows-transcription-step
assertions.description: Skill shows the transcribe.py command since no .txt file exists
assertions.check: Response includes a reference to running transcribe.py or the transcription script

assertions.name: title-has-griot-and-grits-prefix
assertions.description: Generated YouTube title starts with 'Griot and Grits - '
assertions.check: Title field in response starts with exactly 'Griot and Grits - '

assertions.name: tags-include-brooklyn
assertions.description: Tags include 'Brooklyn' — explicitly mentioned in the interview
assertions.check: Response includes 'Brooklyn' in the tag list

assertions.name: no-unnamed-person-in-people-tags
assertions.description: Does NOT add an unknown/unnamed person to the people tags
assertions.check: Response does not add a generic or unnamed entry to the people section of tags; only named individuals from filters.yaml people list are used

assertions.name: description-is-one-paragraph
assertions.description: YouTube description is a single prose paragraph, no bullet points
assertions.check: Description section contains no bullet points or numbered lists

assertions.name: upload-command-has-correct-video
assertions.description: Upload command references the correct video filename
assertions.check: Upload script command includes 'unknown_speaker.mp4'

assertions.name: post-upload-checklist-present
assertions.description: Post-upload YouTube Studio manual checklist is shown
assertions.check: Response includes checklist items for Altered Content, Remixing, and Comments moderation
